scanMeta.abortReason: Front MCP search API is non-functional in this environment. `mcp__frontapp__search_conversations` returns HTTP 404 for every query (tried: 'vimeo', 'vimeo.com', 'body:vimeo.com', 'subject:vimeo', 'status:archived', '"vimeo.com"'). `mcp__frontapp__list_conversations` accepts a `q` parameter but silently ignores it — returns identical reverse-chronological results regardless of query value. Without a working content-search filter, the only option is full enumeration of the #Hello - Peech inbox (~20k conversations since 2025-01-01), requiring ~20k `list_conversation_messages` calls. That exceeds the 1000-call budget by 20x. No partial results produced to avoid generating statistically biased data.
